understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to place all selectable pieces onto goal tiles (marked '+') simultaneously. Each level has a grid with obstacles and a limited number of steps to complete it. The run ended without winning because steps ran out and not all pieces were on goals.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player controls one or more selectable pieces. CLICK with a target position selects the piece at that coordinate (if any), switching the active selection from the previous piece. The selected piece can then be moved using MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT, MOVE_UP, or MOVE_DOWN, which shifts it one cell in the direction, presumably blocked by walls or obstacles. All pieces must occupy goal tiles at the same time to trigger a WIN. Steps are consumed by each action, and running out of steps without winning fails the level.
